CalibrationBin.description: One probability bin of a calibration view: predicted vs observed grant rate.

lower.description: Bin lower bound on P(granted), inclusive
lower.title: Lower

mean_probability.description: Mean predicted P(granted) within the bin
mean_probability.title: Mean Probability

observed_granted_rate.description: Realized grant rate among the bin's cases
observed_granted_rate.title: Observed Granted Rate

predictions.description: Predictions whose P(granted) fell in this bin
predictions.title: Predictions

upper.description: Bin upper bound on P(granted); inclusive for the top bin
upper.title: Upper

CalibrationBin.title: CalibrationBin

CertBacktestEntry.description: One predictor's standings over the cert back-test set.

accuracy.description: Fraction whose predicted disposition matched the known label
accuracy.title: Accuracy

calibration.description: P(granted) decile bins: predicted probability vs observed grant rate
calibration.title: Calibration

granted_accuracy.description: Fraction whose binary granted/denied projection matched the outcome
granted_accuracy.title: Granted Accuracy

lift_over_always_denied.description: Disposition accuracy minus the always-deny floor's — the honest signal under cert's structural denial skew, where raw accuracy is cheap
lift_over_always_denied.title: Lift Over Always Denied

mean_brier_score.description: Mean Brier score of P(granted) vs the realized outcome (lower is better)
mean_brier_score.title: Mean Brier Score

segments.description: Per-salience-band skill breakdown over the paid scored segment (high, elevated, baseline; bands with no petition omitted) — the segment-baseline skill the forward stratum measures. Empty when no statpack was supplied (offline runs) or no paid-segment petition was scored
segments.title: Segments

CertBacktestEntry.title: CertBacktestEntry

CertBacktestSegment.description:
One salience-band slice of a predictor's cert back-test standings.

Reconciles the offline cert back-test with the live prediction process: the
forward tournament now scores skill against the **segment base rate** (the
predicted slice's own grant rate, not the whole-docket rate), so the back-test
reports the same, per ``sal-v1`` band, over the paid scored segment (IFP
petitions are outside it). ``segment_base_rate`` is the mean of the items'
leakage-safe per-Term band rates (each computed over Terms strictly before its
own), and ``mean_brier_skill`` the mean skill against them — null when no item
in the band had a prior-Term base rate.

accuracy.description: Disposition accuracy over the band's petitions
accuracy.title: Accuracy

band.description: The frozen sal-v1 band: high / elevated / baseline
band.title: Band

mean_brier_score.description: Mean Brier score of P(granted) over the band
mean_brier_score.title: Mean Brier Score

mean_brier_skill.description: Mean Brier skill vs the segment base rate over the band (positive beats the base rate, ~0 parrots it, negative is worse); null when no item had a base rate
mean_brier_skill.title: Mean Brier Skill

segment_base_rate.description: Mean leakage-safe segment base rate over the band's items (each item's own prior-Term band grant rate); null when none had one
segment_base_rate.title: Segment Base Rate

CertBacktestSegment.title: CertBacktestSegment

description:
``metrics/cert-backtest.json`` — predictors replayed over decided cert petitions.

The standing instrument for vetting cert predictors and prompt changes:
replay over a curated set of resolved modern discretionary-cert petitions
(outcome hidden — the replay provisions a redacted snapshot), scored against
the realized grant/deny. Produced by the maintainer-triggered
``run-backtest`` workflow via ``fedcourts cert-backtest``
(it spends tokens when agentic engines are replayed), never by a schedule.

always_denied_accuracy.description: The always-deny floor's disposition accuracy over this set (the denial base rate every lift figure is measured against)
always_denied_accuracy.title: Always Denied Accuracy

events_scored.description: Size of the cert back-test set
events_scored.title: Events Scored

predictors_evaluated.description: Number of predictors on the board
predictors_evaluated.title: Predictors Evaluated

stratum.description: Every replayed petition resolved before any modern model's training cutoff, so this measures recall, calibration, and label-mapping fit over known history, never ex-ante forecasting skill (the same pre-registration rule the leaderboard stratifies on).
stratum.title: Stratum

title: CertBacktest
